Video.summary: Step inside a busy Bondi tattoo studio where tourists, backpackers and local hipsters flock to get inked. A brother and sister remember Mum and a Russian burlesque dancer shocks the staff.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 1

Video.summary: Grand Final day in Bondi sees Brit boys mixing it up with quirky tatts and belly bling, a young Mother’s first time braving the needle and a visit from the studios eldest client – an 83 year old grandmother.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 2

Video.summary: A new father commemorates birth, whilst a heartbroken son laments his loss. A client inspires with her brave attitude, and a recent divorcee gets inked for his new girl - but will their relationship survive the sitting?
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 3

Video.summary: John and Wendy put a potential new artist through the ringer, as Josh struggles to maintain order. Navy brothers on a mission and a breast cancer survivor marking her courage are followed by a night of hilarious antics.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 4

Video.summary: Loud, proud footy fans ink their loyalty, while Aaron celebrates a different kind of faith. Dan helps a client through crippling pain, and as one extreme ink addict sends a message to society, so does ‘glamazon’ Mink.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 5

Video.summary: From the guilty to the most innocent – and everything in between. Tensions peak as a staff meeting kicks off a busy day. A baby, a criminal, a heart wrenching loss, a pole dancer, a pin-up, and the biggest tattoo yet.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 6

Video.summary: It’s a battle of the sexes for the highest pain threshold. Country girl Cas celebrates her new found confidence, while Rachel mourns her past. A risky tatt for Nan and patience wears thin as the studio is invaded by ‘blokes.’
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 7

Video.summary: Excitement is in the air with a VIP client. Julie curates her life on her skin, while Shaun helps Sandy through a crippling struggle. It’s a celebration of life, with clients and staff all weighing in.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 8

Video.summary: Nicky travels to the Pyramids, and has them all to herself! Dr. Caroline shows us how three hours of stress busting can have us breathing easy, and Eric shares his finance tips on how we can all live the good life.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 12

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 12
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 12
Guide to the Good Life Season 1 Episode 12

Video.summary: Jess, has wanted a dog for as long as she can remember, but living with her parents and renting has thrown up several ‘road blocks’. Jess wants a dog that her mum will cope with, and that will get along with her other passion….her horses.
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 9

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 9
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 9
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 9

Video.summary: Julien & Nicolette have three daughters, and Keira, 4, has an irrational fear of dogs. Dr. Lisa advises that the best thing to do might be to get a dog. Will the cure work and what special issues do three young girls put in her way?
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 10

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 10
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 10
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 10

Video.summary: In the very first Just Go episode Rhys uncovers some hidden gems in the Victorian town of Bendigo. Lee learns the secret behind some delicious but healthy food, and Geoff Cox visits tropical Port Douglas.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 1

Video.summary: On Queensland’s famous Gold Coast Lee explores iconic attractions and dines at a very entertaining restaurant. Rhys tries out a fun, unusual way to get fit in Melbourne, while Geoff Cox takes Lee to see Australia’s magnificent red centre.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 2

Video.summary: Lee and Rhys explore Victoria’s Bellarine Peninsula. Lee finds foodie heaven on the delicious Taste Trail, while Rhys jumps aboard the Blues Train in historic Queenscliff. Geoff Cox discovers a capital way to see the sights in Canberra.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 3

Video.summary: Rhys tours the world-class wine country of the Yarra Valley in style. Lee taste tests a breakfast with a twist and experiences the tantalizing delights of African cuisine. Geoff Cox explores Sydney.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 4

Video.summary: Lee visit the New South Wales north coast and gets up close to majestic wildlife in Byron Bay, then heads south to Melbourne for a foodie fix that takes her back to her Chinese roots. Rhys and Geoff Cox head to Albury on the Murray River.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 5

Video.summary: Lee explores the Mornington Peninsula, a destination that offers plenty to see and do, then cooks up a storm Vietnamese style and shares some of her favourite recipes. Rhys and Geoff Cox discover the beautiful New South Wales south coast.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 6

Video.summary: Rhys explores the Victorian coastal town of Inverloch, finding some high-octane fun. Lee discovers a hidden gem amongst Melbourne’s skyline, while Geoff Cox experiences the beautiful Tasmanian wilderness near Strahan.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 7

Video.summary: Lee explores the other side to Queensland’s Gold Coast – its stunning hinterland and learns some tricks to cooking delicious cuisine from the USA. Rhys and Coxy take it up a notch in Yarrawonga, on the Victorian and New South Wales border.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 8

Video.summary: Rhys shares the secrets of Phillip Island - his hometown on Victoria’s rugged coastline. Lee travels to Alice Springs on the hunt for bush tucker, and Coxy enjoys the Queensland sunshine and plenty of activities in tropical Mackay.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 9

Video.summary: In this China special, Rhys soars above the clouds on his way up one of China’s most spectacular mountains, Geoff Cox takes in the sights in Tianjin, and Rhys visits Fenghuang, a picturesque city that hasn’t changed in three hundred years.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 10

Video.summary: Noelle and Luke have been living in an apartment, but with three children it was time for a house with a backyard and …a dog to play in that backyard! Can Dr. Lisa Chimes find them the perfect dog?
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 1

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 1
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 1
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 1

Video.summary: Single mum Jenny and her three kids live in a rented house with a big backyard and son Harrison wants a dog. The backyard is in need of repair and the family can’t decide on what sort of dog to get. Can they all agree on the one dog?
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 2

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 2
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 2
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 2

Video.summary: Dr Chris Brown and Dr Lisa Chimes head out to the burnt regions of the Blue Mountains on the Sydney outskirts the day after some of the most intense bushfires on record. The mass evacuations of farms and properties have left animals injured, stranded or in distress. The Bondi Vet team take to the road to help where they can. The last thing Chris expected was to be treating a baby alpaca named Jersey. Jersey’s mother went into premature labour, brought on by the stressful evacuation of the herd from their fire threatened property. Now the new-born Cria (baby alpaca) is listless and deteriorating alarming.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 6 Episode 1

Video.summary: In this episode of Bondi Vet, Georgie, a small rescue dog, is brought in to see Dr Chris Brown. Georgie has a massive growth on her leg and Chris discovers another lump that is possibly more sinister. she will need an immediate, marathon operation that Chris hopes the dog can survive.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 6 Episode 2

Video.summary: Dr Chris is heading to the Halls Gap Zoo in Western Victoria where Stephanie the Lemur awaits. Recently the keepers have noticed her left canine tooth has darkened and are concerned it is an infection that could become a major problem for the small Lemur, especially as they suspect she may be pregnant.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 6 Episode 3

Video.summary: Dr Chris has received a call from Tim Faulkner at the Australian Reptile Park. One of the parks kangaroo’s has a nasty lump under its chin and Chris needs to make an emergency dash to the park to perform an urgent operation, that is made more difficult as the roo is a mother with young joey.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 6 Episode 4

Video.summary: “It doesn’t get much better than this” is one of the first things that Dr Chris says when a 4 week old baby lion cub Zambi is brought into the Bondi Clinic. For safety reasons Zambi has had to be removed from her mother by carers Donna and Mandy from the animal welfare organization LOTL (Life On The Line) Rescue. Not only does the young lion require a medical checkup but she also needs a surrogate mother and Dr Chris has the perfect – while very strange solution. No one is sure if it will work.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 6 Episode 5

Video.summary: Chris is in Cairns, a place he loves because no case is ever straightforward in the tropics and he is not disappointed. His first case is to try to solve the mystery medical condition of Snoopy, a Jack Russell terrier, who at odd times suffers strange and potentially deadly attacks.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 6 Episode 6

Video.summary: Here’s a question for you, which Australian town doesn’t actually grow the fruit it’s named after? The answer, Orange. It does however grow over 170 varieties of apples, berries, figs and stone fruit.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 3 Episode 11

Video.summary: The Victorian town of Daylesford is best known for its day spas, mineral springs and romantic holiday destinations. It is now quickly being recognised as a real foodies paradise where you can go for a true paddock plate experience as well.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 3 Episode 12

Video.summary: Tim heads to Roebuck Bay in Western Australia, one of the most important migratory shorebird stop off points in the world.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 13

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 13
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 13
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 13

Video.summary: A visit to Rottnest Island off the Western Australian coast would not be complete without a quokka encounter, surely one the cutest animals on the planet and Tim comes across plenty of these threatened species.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 14

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 14
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 14
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 14

Video.summary: Tim heads to the Flinders Ranges in South Australia to help with the release of spotted quolls – a species that had not been seen in the region for over a century.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 15

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 15
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 15
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 15

Video.summary: Tim heads out into the Southern Ocean for an up close encounter with great white sharks. Later Tim introduces his boss to the first captively bred dwarf king brown snakes in existence.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 16

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 16
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 16
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 16

Video.summary: Whenever there’s the possibility of new arrivals at the park Tim’s excited. And he doesn’t get any more excited than when it’s expectant Australian natives like bilbys and dingos.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 17

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 17
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 17
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 17

Video.summary: Tim goes in search of a long since lost species of frog in Queensland as he discovers just how important amphibians are to the survival of the planet.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 18

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 18
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 18
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 18

Video.summary: Tim heads to South Australia to meet the fascinating pygmy blue tongue lizard. Once thought extinct, it’s now a race against time to make sure the existing population survive.
Video.title: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 19

Image.alt: Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 19
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 19
Wild Life of Tim Faulkner Season 3 Episode 19

Video.summary: Devonport is just a hop, skip and a jump south from Victoria and offers some of the world’s best produce. From salmon to ginseng, wasabi, carrots, cabbage, potatoes, apples and chicken, you’ll never run out of new ingredients to try.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 3 Episode 13

Video.summary: The twin towns of Cobram and Barooga sit either side of the picturesque Murray River. With wide sandy beaches and towering river gums, Cobram-Barooga offers a relaxed lifestyle set amid fine agricultural land, rich in fruit and dairy.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 4 Episode 1

Video.summary: Echuca is set within an irrigated pastoral and agricultural district on the Murray River. It offers organic fruit & veggies, gorgeous tender veal & goat, gourmet greens, fresher than fresh olive oil.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 4 Episode 2

Video.summary: Paul’s first stop in the Hunter Valley is at Binnorie Dairy where he meets cheese maker Simon Gough. Simon happily shows off his array of cheese making equipment and of course homemade cheeses.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 4 Episode 3

Video.summary: Greater Shepparton is synonymous with great food, wine, waterways and weather. The area features magnificent food and wine, glorious weather and all the attractions and activities you could imagine in a regional city.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 4 Episode 4

Video.summary: The views at Kookootonga Nut Farm in the Blue Mountains are absolutely spectacular, flourishing trees which produce ripe chestnuts engulf the entire property. Paul helps out selecting some fresh nuts straight off the trees.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 4 Episode 5

Video.summary: The Gold Coast offers a range of activities to please the entire family. From visiting one of the thrilling theme parks, enjoying the night life or just relaxing on one of the amazing beaches, it is truly a spot to unwind and enjoy!
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 4 Episode 6

Video.summary: The Adelaide Hills is a picturesque part of Australia offering beautiful farm land, villages and vistas. Situated only twenty minutes from the city of Adelaide, The Adelaide Hills proves to be a perfect location to relax and regenerate.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 4 Episode 7

Video.summary: The Waikato Region is located on the North Island of New Zealand. Surrounded by natural beauty it is a region where the scenery is lush and green, the soil is fertile, rainfall is dependable and temperatures are ideal.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 4 Episode 8

Video.summary: The Bellarine Peninsula which offers an abundance of activities such as snorkelling, kayaking and swimming with dolphins. The area is also one of Victoria’s latest foodie destinations offering a plethora of flavorsome produce.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 4 Episode 9

Video.summary: BENDIGO Bendigo was one of the biggest gold finds in history. it’s literally built on rivers of gold. Her grand hotels and theatres have played host to international celebrities… and some shady characters too.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 5

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 5
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 5
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 5

Video.summary: NEWCASTLE Like it's English namesake, Australia’s Newcastle also has a reputation for toughness and heavy toil, but it’s also a town with a unique identity, a rich maritime history and more than its share of eccentric characters.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 6

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 6
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 6
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 6
